title: Science Advisory Committee on Pest Control Products: Meetings - Canada.ca
content:
## Science Advisory Committee on Pest Control Products: Meetings
- Committee Advisory Reports
- Call for nominations
The Science Advisory Committee on Pest Control Products has been meeting virtually, as needed, since July 2022. Meeting agendas and topics for discussion for upcoming meetings are provided. A summary of the discussion will be provided following the conclusion of a meeting.
Portions of meetings are open for members of the public to observe. Refer to each meeting agenda for information on portions of meetings open to the public. If you wish to observe an upcoming meeting of the SAC-PCP please contact the Secretariat by e-mail: pmra.sacpcp-ccspa.arla@hc-sc.gc.ca
- November 27, 2025 Agenda
- January 30 and 31, 2025 Agenda Meeting summary
- June 26, 2024 Agenda Meeting summary
- April 17, 2024 Agenda Meeting summary Summary of SAC-PCP feedback
